title: Korbond Invisible Threads Clear & Smoke 2 x 110m-110055, Nylon, 220m, white
description: From the manufacturer Korbond Care & Repair Invisible Threads Clear and Smoke. AVAILABLE NOW More Products From Korbond Care & Repair Stitch Ripper Home Needle Kit Needle Threaders Korbond Care & Repair Invisible Threads Clear and Smoke 2 x 110 m Korbond Invisible Thread twin pack is suitable for any fabric that requires invisible repair work. It is recommended that the clear colourblend is used for light coloured fabrics and the smoke colourblend for dark coloured fabrics. Contents Include: 2 x 110m bobbins-clear & smoke Handy Usages For Korbond Invisable Threads Clear And Smoke Mend & Repair A monofilament that reflects colour for invisible repair. Perfect for sewing multi-coloured or patterned clothing, rethreading a broken necklace, and in place of a missing screw when reattaching the arm on a pair of glasses. Around The Home A transparent thread that can be used to hang a stained-glass sun catcher in a window, or displaying a row of birthday or Christmas cards along a wall. Fashion & Jewellery Design Perfect for intricate beadwork, adding bead or sequin embellishments to clothes and making beaded jewellery. Be Decorative Invisible Thread makes homemade ornaments and decorations look as though they are fixed in place by magic. A great way to suspend lightweight items from a ceiling or mobile.
